archetype: Archetype 4 (Swiss & High-Contrast) - Modified for Premium Developer SaaS
design_philosophy: A premium, vendable SaaS dashboard inspired by Linear, Vercel, Stripe, and Supabase. Dark mode is default. The design must feel high-end, extremely precise, and use subtle contrasts rather than bright colors. Emphasize extremely thin borders (1px), subtle glowing highlights, and dense, functional grid layouts.

hierarchy.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl font-medium tracking-tighter leading-none text-white
hierarchy.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl font-medium tracking-tight leading-tight text-white
hierarchy.h4: text-sm sm:text-base font-medium tracking-wide text-zinc-300 uppercase

rules: Use extremely tight tracking on large headings (-0.02em to -0.04em).
Use uppercase with wide tracking for overlines and small table headers.
Avoid pure `#000000` text on light surfaces. Never use pure white backgrounds in dark mode.
Primary actions use white backgrounds with black text for stark contrast.
Use extremely subtle tinted grays for neutral backgrounds.

surfaces.cards: bg-[#0A0A0A] border border-white/10 rounded-xl shadow-none overflow-hidden

buttons.primary: bg-white text-black hover:bg-zinc-200 font-medium rounded-lg px-4 py-2 transition-colors
buttons.secondary: bg-[#111111] text-white border border-white/10 hover:bg-[#1A1A1A] hover:border-white/20 font-medium rounded-lg px-4 py-2 transition-all
buttons.ghost: text-zinc-400 hover:text-white hover:bg-white/5 rounded-lg px-4 py-2 transition-colors

inputs.default: bg-[#0A0A0A] border border-white/10 rounded-lg text-white placeholder-zinc-500 focus:border-white/30 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-white/30 transition-all px-3 py-2
inputs.search: bg-[#111111] border-none rounded-lg text-white placeholder-zinc-500 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-white/20 pl-10

tables.header: text-xs uppercase tracking-wider text-zinc-500 font-semibold border-b border-white/10 pb-3

badges.default: bg-[#111111] border border-white/10 text-zinc-300 px-2 py-1 rounded-md text-xs font-medium
badges.active: bg-blue-500/10 border border-blue-500/20 text-blue-400 px-2 py-1 rounded-md text-xs font-medium

charts.grid: Use dashed lines with 0.1 opacity for horizontal guides. No vertical grid lines.
charts.tooltip: Glassmorphism tooltip: bg-black/80 backdrop-blur-md border border-white/10 rounded-lg shadow-xl

motion.hover: Subtle border lighting and 1-2% background lightening. No heavy lifting or deep shadows.
motion.page_load: Staggered fade-in and slight slide-up (translate-y-2) for dashboard widgets.

login_background.description: Abstract dark geometric minimal background for the login page hero section.

instructions_to_main_agent: You are building NexCRM. The overall aesthetic must perfectly match a top-tier developer tooling dashboard (Linear, Vercel, Stripe).
Use Phosphor Icons (@phosphor-icons/react) with a duotone or bold weight to match the premium tech aesthetic.
Implement the 'Tracing Beam' or extremely subtle border hovers for dashboard KPI cards.
All interactive elements (buttons, inputs, links) MUST have a `data-testid` attribute in kebab-case (e.g., `data-testid='login-submit-button'`).
Do not use generic Shadcn cards out-of-the-box without modifying them to fit the flat, thin-bordered, dark background style.
For the Kanban board, use a very dense layout with flat cards. The board background should be `#000000` and the cards `#0A0A0A`.
Ensure all text has sufficient contrast. Use `#EDEDED` (zinc-200) for primary text, not pure white.
Use Recharts for the analytics. The charts must be extremely minimal. No thick grid lines. Use an area chart with a gradient fill going from solid to transparent at the bottom.
Install `lucide-react` or `@phosphor-icons/react` for icons if not present. Use `@phosphor-icons/react` natively.
The login page must use the `login_background` image with a very heavy dark overlay or glassmorphism panel for the login form.
